_note: Retrieval gold set. Each entry is a question + the (source_table, source_id) of cases that MUST appear in the top-K retrieval. Add entries as you discover questions that regress or improve — then re-run `npm run eval:retrieval` before and after a change to see the delta.

_format.id: stable short id, used in the report
_format.question: natural-language query as a user would type it
_format.filters: optional SearchFilters applied as if the user set them in the UI (session filters)
_format.expected_cases: list of cases that should appear in the top-K. Weight each 'must' (fail if missing) or 'should' (lose precision points if missing)

queries.question: What is the applicability of grounds of arrest under Article 22?

expected_cases.note: Prabir Purkayastha v State (NCT of Delhi) — landmark on grounds of arrest

queries.notes: Original failing case from 2026-04-19 CrPC bug.
